facts.claim: Discover Celebrity Reflection. View the award-winning luxury cruise ship's deck plan, staterooms, dining options, things to do and upcoming sailings.
Celebrity Reflection is the fifth, final, and largest Solstice-class cruise ship, her sister ships being Celebrity Equinox, Celebrity Eclipse, Celebrity Solstice and Celebrity Silhouette.
Since October 2012, it has been owned and operated by Celebrity Cruises.
The ship can accommodate 3,046 passengers, second only to the Celebrity Beyond in the Celebrity fleet.
